title: HDX manifest
description: The HDX manifest contract (spec §11): six required non-derivable floor properties plus one optional known gridded-static consumer channel ABI declaration. additionalProperties:false rejects every unknown or derivable property (M3 too-many), while required lists all six floor properties (M3 too-few).

format_version.description: Hard version cut, read first (spec §14 M1/M2): "0.1" (geometry-mandatory) or "0.2" (geometry-optional). Any other value is rejected outright.

name.description: Dataset identity — generic, not a role label (spec §11).

created_at.description: Dataset creation time as an RFC 3339 timestamp (spec §14 M4).

producer_version.description: The tool/version that wrote the dataset (spec §11).

gridded_static_channels.description: Optional per-grid consumer channel ABI. Keys are non-empty grid labels; each value is a non-empty ordered array of unique non-empty field names. Array order is consumer order, not physical TIFF sample order; absence is an empty legacy declaration.
